plan.designTitle: ADR: Add configurable timeout flag to CLI
plan.changeStrategy: Add a --timeout flag to the CLI that overrides the default 300s timeout for LLM calls. The flag should be parsed in the run-capability and run-workflow commands and passed through to the adapter.

risks.risk: Timeout value not propagated to adapter layer
risks.trigger: Adapter ignores custom timeout and uses its own default

validationPlan.ac: CLI accepts --timeout flag and passes value to adapter
validationPlan.verification: Run with --timeout 60 and confirm the adapter receives 60000ms

steps.title: Add timeout option to LLMAdapter interface
steps.goal: Extend the adapter interface to accept an optional timeout parameter on complete().
steps.description: Modify src/runtime/types.ts to add an optional timeoutMs parameter to the LLMAdapter.complete() method signature.
steps.acceptanceCriteria: LLMAdapter interface includes optional timeoutMs in complete() signature.

steps.title: Parse --timeout flag in CLI
steps.goal: Extract --timeout value from CLI args and pass it to the adapter.
steps.description: In src/cli.ts, parse --timeout from args in run-capability and run-workflow commands. Convert to milliseconds and pass as option to the adapter.
steps.acceptanceCriteria: CLI parses --timeout flag and converts to milliseconds for adapter use.
